# Wave Tuning

## When to Use
- Defining new wave sets.
- Rebalancing difficulty curves.
- Diagnosing pacing spikes and downtime.

## Procedure
1. Define target difficulty profile.
2. Configure spawn cadence and composition.
3. Set reward cadence and checkpoint moments.
4. Run stress and readability tests.
5. Adjust using documented tuning levers.

## References
- [Wave template](./assets/wave-template.md)
- [Wave balancing worksheet](./assets/wave-balancing-worksheet.md)
